story.tasks: 7 main tasks with 25+ subtasks defined covering Husky installation, pre-commit hook creation, lint check, format check, optional test run, commit blocking, and documentation

story-context.acceptanceCriteria: 1. Husky installed ve initialized 2. `.husky/pre-commit` hook oluşturulmuş 3. Pre-commit checks: - Lint check (eslint --fix) - Format check (prettier --check) - Optional: Test run (fast unit tests only) 4. Commit blocked if checks fail 5. `package.json`: `"prepare": "husky install"` 6. README: Hook'ları bypass etme (--no-verify) discouraged

doc.title: Epic 12: Code Quality & Standards
doc.snippet: Story 12.3: Husky Pre-Commit Hooks - As a developer, I want pre-commit hooks, so that bad code commit edilemesin. Dependencies: Story 12.2

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: Code Quality & Standards
doc.snippet: AC 12.3: Husky Pre-Commit Hooks - Requirements: Husky installed, .husky/pre-commit hook, pre-commit checks (lint, format, optional tests), commit blocked on failures

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: Code Quality & Standards
doc.snippet: Pre-Commit Workflow diagram: Developer git commit → Trigger .husky/pre-commit → Run eslint --fix → Check violations → Run prettier --check → Block on failures → Allow/Block commit

doc.title: PRD - Non-Functional Requirements: Coding Standards
doc.snippet: hrsync-backend proven testing patterns with Jest, Arrange-Act-Assert pattern, proper mocking with jest.clearAllMocks()

doc.title: Story 12.2: Prettier Configuration
doc.section: Dev Notes - Learnings from Previous Story
doc.snippet: Prettier Foundation Established: .prettierrc configured, ESLint + Prettier integration active, format on save configured, integration strategy for Husky

file.reason: Provides ESLint configuration foundation that Husky pre-commit hook will leverage for lint checks
Provides Prettier configuration and format script that Husky pre-commit hook will use for format checks
Defines npm run lint, npm run format commands that pre-commit hook will execute

story-context.constraints: - Pre-commit hooks must complete in < 10 seconds for developer productivity - Husky v8+ required for git hooks management - Integration with existing ESLint (Story 12.1) and Prettier (Story 12.2) configurations - Lint-first approach: ESLint fix before Prettier check - Fail-fast behavior: Stop on first failure - Reuse existing .eslintrc.js, .prettierrc, package.json scripts - Optional test run limited to fast unit tests only - Staged files only for faster execution - Commit blocked on violations with clear error messages

interface.name: NPM Scripts
interface.signature: npm run lint (eslint --fix), npm run format (prettier --write)

interface.name: Prettier Configuration
interface.signature: .prettierrc with semi: true, singleQuote: true, tabWidth: 2, trailingComma: all, arrowParens: always

tests.standards: Jest testing framework with Arrange-Act-Assert pattern. All configuration validated with CLI commands. Fast execution requirement < 10s. Clear error messages, commit blocked on violations. Follow Epic 9 testing infrastructure patterns and hrsync-backend proven testing practices.
tests.locations: src/**/*.test.ts, src/**/*.spec.ts, __test__/ directory, test/ directory. Pre-commit hook tests: verify hook registration, verify checks execute, verify violations block commit, verify fast execution < 10s.
tests.ideas: - Test: Verify husky install works and .husky directory created - Test: Verify pre-commit hook is registered and executable - Test: Verify lint check executes and violations block commit - Test: Verify format check executes and formatting issues block commit - Test: Verify optional test run doesn't exceed 10s limit - Test: Verify commit with violations is blocked - Test: Verify commit after fixes is allowed
